title: Delhi HC seeks response from journalist Saurav Das, AAP's Gopal Rai on contempt plea for targeting Justice Swarana Kanta Sharma
description: The Delhi High Court on Friday issued notice to journalist Saurav Das and Aam Aadmi Party (AAP) leader Gopal Rai on a criminal contempt of court petition filed against them by a lawyer for allegedly running a "coordinated" campaign to target Justice Swarana Kanta Sharma. However, the Division Bench of Justices Navin Chawla and Ravinder Dudeja did not issue notice to two other respondents, AAP chief Arvind Kejriwal and another AAP leader Saurabh Bharadwaj, since the two are already facing contemp
